channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-12968] KASAN: slab-out-of-bounds in mgs_wlp_lcfg+0xb3/0x4a0 [mgs]
item.description:
==================================================================
Nov 5 19:39:50 mds kernel: BUG: KASAN: slab-out-of-bounds in mgs_wlp_lcfg+0xb3/0x4a0 [mgs]
Nov 5 19:39:50 mds kernel: Read of size 64 at addr ffff8880b8f9fe40 by task ll_mgs_0002/17603
Nov 5 19:39:50 mds kernel:
Nov 5 19:39:50 mds kernel: CPU: 2 PID: 17603 Comm: ll_mgs_0002 Tainted: P O 5.4.0-1.ldiskfs.d.el7.x86_64 #1
Nov 5 19:39:50 mds kernel: Hardware name: QEMU Standard PC (i440FX + PIIX, 1996), BIOS 1.12.0-1 04/01/2014
Nov 5 19:39:50 mds kernel: Call Trace:
Nov 5 19:39:50 mds kernel: dump_stack+0x7b/0xba
Nov 5 19:39:50 mds kernel: ? mgs_wlp_lcfg+0xb3/0x4a0 [mgs]

Nov 5 19:39:50 mds kernel: page:ffffea0002e3e780 refcount:1 mapcount:0 mapping:ffff88810c00f440 index:0x0 compound_mapcount: 0

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Oleg Drokin (green@whamcloud.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/36753/
Subject: LU-12968 mgs: Prevent reading past end of buffer
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 77e165662c054c9fbfcebe529b7d2a676a1587f3

Shaun Tancheff (stancheff@cray.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/36753
Subject: LU-12968 mgs: Prevent reading past end of buffer
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 80d93b9684be6218ccf838c17e6673524ea17f18
